allow: PowerShell(node $env:WMUX_CLI capabilities 2>&1 | Out-String; "=====AGENT====="; node $env:WMUX_CLI agent 2>&1 | Out-String; "=====AGENT SPAWN====="; node $env:WMUX_CLI agent spawn 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell($out = node $env:WMUX_CLI agent spawn --cmd "cmd /c echo probe" --label orch-probe 2>&1 | Out-String; "=====SPAWN RETURN====="; $out; "=====AGENT LIST====="; node $env:WMUX_CLI agent list 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell("=====STATUS====="; node $env:WMUX_CLI agent status agent-80d03cde-d5de-4ea3-8cf3-9badb62e69cf 2>&1 | Out-String; "=====READ-SCREEN w/ --surface \(expect ignored\)====="; node $env:WMUX_CLI read-screen --surface surf-479370ba-10d6-4e7a-aff7-dbe281c5d673 --lines 5 2>&1 | Out-String; "=====KILL PROBE====="; node $env:WMUX_CLI agent kill agent-80d03cde-d5de-4ea3-8cf3-9badb62e69cf 2>&1 | Out-String)
